name: Your Full Name
summary: Passionate ML/AI Engineer with 2 years of experience building Python-based systems, REST APIs, and LLM-powered applications. Strong background in deep learning, data pipelines, and deploying scalable backend services.

bullets: Built a text classification pipeline using BERT achieving 94% accuracy on production customer support data.
Reduced model inference latency by 40% by exporting models to ONNX and deploying with FastAPI.
Collaborated with the product team to integrate ML features shipped to 10,000+ active users.
Wrote data preprocessing pipelines in Python that reduced manual cleaning effort by 60%.

projects.name: JobAgent AI
projects.description: Autonomous job-hunting pipeline that scrapes 50+ daily listings, scores them with Claude API, tailors resumes, and sends a morning digest email with PDF attachments.

projects.name: Your Second Project
projects.description: Brief description of what it does, what problem it solves, and the impact.
